description: Create core/heartbeat.sh - Agent heartbeat script that sends periodic keepalive POSTs to Master's /heartbeat endpoint. Also update core/install.sh and core/docker-entrypoint.sh to inject the heartbeat cron entry (every 10 minutes), and add MASTER_WEBHOOK_URL config variable.
steps: Create core/heartbeat.sh: Read config from /opt/ip_sentinel/config.conf, collect system status (node_name, agent_version, public_ip, agent_port, region_code, uptime, load average, timestamp), build JSON payload, sign with HMAC-SHA256 using CHAT_ID as key (sign the JSON body string with timestamp), POST to ${MASTER_WEBHOOK_URL}/heartbeat with signature in X-Signature and X-Timestamp headers. Gracefully handle failures (log warning, exit 0).
In core/heartbeat.sh: Skip execution if MASTER_WEBHOOK_URL is not set in config (backward compatible with old configs that dont have this variable).

Modify core/install.sh: After existing config.conf generation (the 'cat > $CONFIG_FILE' heredoc), add a new line MASTER_WEBHOOK_URL="" (empty by default, user can set later). Also add a prompt during TG configuration asking for Master Webhook URL (optional, for heartbeat).

Modify core/install.sh: In the crontab injection section (both systemd timer path and cron fallback path), add a heartbeat entry: */10 * * * * /bin/bash ${INSTALL_DIR}/core/heartbeat.sh >/dev/null 2>&1
Modify core/install.sh: In the file download section [6/7], add: curl -fsSL ${REPO_RAW_URL}/core/heartbeat.sh -o ${TMP_CORE}/heartbeat.sh
Modify core/docker-entrypoint.sh: Add heartbeat cron entry (*/10 * * * *) to CRON_CONTENT variable alongside existing runner.sh and updater.sh entries
Modify core/docker-entrypoint.sh: Add MASTER_WEBHOOK_URL environment variable handling in the config generation section (with default empty string)
In core/heartbeat.sh: Include the node_alias in the payload so Master can display friendly names
acceptance_criteria: core/heartbeat.sh exists and passes 'bash -n core/heartbeat.sh' syntax validation
core/heartbeat.sh sources config.conf, checks for MASTER_WEBHOOK_URL, sends POST with HMAC signature
core/heartbeat.sh exits 0 gracefully when MASTER_WEBHOOK_URL is empty or unset
core/install.sh includes heartbeat.sh in the download list
core/install.sh injects heartbeat cron entry (*/10) in both systemd and non-systemd paths
MASTER_WEBHOOK_URL is added to config.conf template in both install.sh and docker-entrypoint.sh
verification: Grep core/install.sh for 'heartbeat' to confirm cron entries and download
Grep core/docker-entrypoint.sh for 'heartbeat' to confirm cron entry
findings: Created core/heartbeat.sh with HMAC-SHA256 signing, PID lock, and graceful error handling. Added heartbeat to all 3 scheduler paths in install.sh (systemd timer, cron, Alpine restricted scheduler). Added heartbeat cron entry and MASTER_WEBHOOK_URL env var to docker-entrypoint.sh. Added COPY heartbeat.sh to core/Dockerfile. All bash syntax checks pass, both Docker images (master + agent) build successfully.
